reviews.review_description: This game is very well made and has very good and understandable tutorials on how some aircraft’s work, but there is one thing I really want to this game, and that is a free fly mode, and a larger scale of aircraft’s too, maybe like a smaller commercial plane or something, overall this game is a 5/5, really good game :D

As a rusty private pilot I wish there was more content for review. More emergency procedures (instead on just one in the 172). More descriptions on the airspace module. More step by step descriptions on the preflight module. Great concept, but needs more content and work. It would also be more intuitive to control foot movement with left stick, and head movement with right stick (like a FP Shooter setup). Please make more content!!

it shows tools but never teach them and how does this game actually have no free flight I've been looking for soo long to do something  to the Dev I'm sorry and not sorry for calling this game terrible
If it had a free flight where you can take off and land

reviews.review_title: Sorry for abusing the game physics
reviews.review_description: Ngl imma crash on purpose if this has flight simulation just for sun

The app started, I'm asked to choose a topic ("parts of an airplane", "emergency procedures"...). My controllers are working but I tried every possible button on the controllers, I'm unable to select any topic... Doesn't seem to work... I gave up...

I love this 
for learning.  Nothing beats the real deal however this has so much positive upside its just nuts thinking about IFR Commercial ATP and so on.  I can't wait for more lessons and content, including multi engine , prop, turbo prop, TBM, jet, and more!!!!!  Only 4 because I know more is to come.

Thank you for this excellent app provided for free. I can now do virtually a handful of things that take me to my local airport (which I have not had much time to explore much) to watch pilot training flights. I don't know your motivation for this detailed work, but I thank you...sincerely.
This is horrable there should be more lessons to turn on the plane instead of showing all the parts to the plane like we learning shapes this is very bad
Amazing app for learning about airplanes and how to fly! I have never flown a plane or taken a lesson, so the info was completely new to me. The emergency simulation is so cool!
i was trying to manually do a task with the cessna in the preflight topic and it wouldn't let me
It cant work when I press menu so I can’t fly it
I love all the resources you provide us to be better pilots
